aboutSection.description: Behind every great company, there's someone holding it all together. We built CIRO so you don't have to do it alone.
aboutSection.missionP1: To give every operations leader the visibility they deserve — a unified platform that connects every data source, every process, and every team so you can see what's happening and act on it, right now.
aboutSection.missionP2: We believe the next wave of enterprise transformation comes from platforms that don't just analyze data — they help you see, understand, and act on it. Our CIRO LABS RESEARCH division pushes the boundaries of what's possible with AI and computer vision.
aboutSection.visionP1: A world where every enterprise operates with real-time clarity — where you know what's happening before it becomes a problem, and decisions are based on data, not guesses.
aboutSection.visionP2: Where data flows seamlessly across systems, teams work with AI as a partner, and continuous improvement happens automatically.
aboutSection.ctaHeading: Join us in building the future of enterprise AI
aboutSection.ctaDescription: Whether you want to transform your operations or join our team, we'd love to hear from you.

about.heading: Ciro Labs
about.subtitle: Innovation • Research • Development
about.description: Exploring the boundaries of human intelligence through deep tech, computer vision, and AI research. Building the future where AI and human expertise work together on the floor.
about.missionDesc: To push the boundaries of what's possible by developing AI systems that see, understand, and act in the real world — bridging the gap between human intuition and machine precision.

explore.title: Explore
explore.desc: Research the frontiers of computer vision, AI, and human-machine interaction.

innovate.title: Innovate
innovate.desc: Develop technologies that redefine what's possible in industrial AI.

transform.title: Transform
transform.desc: Deploy AI solutions that transform how humans and machines collaborate.

about.whyDeepTechDesc: The next industrial shift isn't about faster machines — it's about intelligent systems that can see, think, and adapt in real time. The cost of staying behind isn't just inefficiency...

manual.label: Manual Processes Still Dominate
manual.desc: Most industrial operations rely on human decision-making for critical processes

data.label: Data Never Analyzed in Time
data.desc: Valuable insights are discovered too late to act on them

delay.label: Average Detection Delay
delay.desc: By the time problems are detected, significant damage has already occurred

about.labsDesc: Where deep research meets real-world application
about.deepTechP1: Ciro Labs emerged from a simple but profound realization: the gap between AI research and practical industrial applications was growing wider every day. While academia pushed the boundaries of what's possible, industry remained stuck with legacy systems and incremental improvements.
about.deepTechP2: We founded Ciro Labs as a bridge — a place where advances in computer vision, machine learning, and robotics could be transformed into practical solutions that solve real problems in manufacturing, logistics, and industrial operations.
about.cvP1: Our core focus on computer vision isn't just about seeing — it's about understanding. We develop AI systems that can interpret complex industrial environments, detect anomalies invisible to human eyes, and make split-second decisions that catch problems before they escalate.
about.cvP2: From thermal imaging analysis to real-time quality control, our computer vision systems don't just observe — they comprehend and act with superhuman precision and speed.
about.futureDesc: We're not just building software — we're creating the neural pathways of tomorrow's industrial landscape, where AI overlays enhance human capability and robotic systems work in perfect harmony with human intuition.

aiOverlays.title: AI Overlays
aiOverlays.desc: Augmented reality interfaces that overlay real-time AI insights directly onto physical environments, giving workers superhuman perception and decision-making capabilities.

robotics.title: Collaborative Robotics
robotics.desc: Robots that don't replace humans but amplify their capabilities, working alongside operators with seamless coordination and shared intelligence.

about.quote: "The future doesn't belong to humans or machines alone — it belongs to the synthesis of human creativity and artificial intelligence, working together to solve problems we never thought possible."
about.videoDesc: Watch how Ciro Labs is pioneering the future of industrial intelligence through deep tech research and practical AI applications.
about.ctaDesc: Join us on the frontier of industrial AI research. Let's push the boundaries of what's possible together.

careers.openPositionsDesc: Ready to make an impact? Explore our current openings and find the perfect role for your skills and career goals.

seniorAi.title: Senior AI Engineer
seniorAi.desc: Lead the development of AI models for industrial applications that help real people run their operations better.
requirements: Strong background in machine learning and deep learning
Experience with PyTorch, TensorFlow, or similar frameworks
Knowledge of computer vision and NLP
Experience with cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, Azure)
Strong software engineering principles

fullStack.title: Full Stack Developer
fullStack.desc: Build scalable web applications and APIs for our AI platform.
requirements: Proficiency in React, TypeScript, and Node.js
Experience with cloud services and databases
Knowledge of API design and microservices
Experience with DevOps and CI/CD
Strong problem-solving skills

productManager.title: Product Manager
productManager.desc: Drive product strategy and execution for AI solutions that make a real difference.
requirements: Experience in B2B SaaS product management
Strong analytical and strategic thinking
Experience with industrial/manufacturing sector
Excellent communication and leadership skills
Data-driven decision making

salesEngineer.title: Sales Engineer
salesEngineer.desc: Bridge the gap between technical capabilities and business value.
requirements: Technical background in software or engineering
Experience in B2B sales or technical consulting
Strong presentation and communication skills
Knowledge of manufacturing/logistics industry
Ability to travel 30-40%

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.subtitle: Your privacy is important to us. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information.
privacyPolicy.introP1: Ciro AI ("we," "our," or "us") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you visit our website, use our services, or interact with us in any way.
privacyPolicy.introP2: By using our services, you agree to the collection and use of information in accordance with this policy. If you do not agree with our policies and practices, please do not use our services.

provide.title: Provide Services
provide.desc: To deliver our AI-powered analytics and business intelligence services

communication.title: Communication
communication.desc: To respond to inquiries and provide customer support

improve.title: Improve Services
improve.desc: To analyze usage patterns and enhance our platform

marketing.title: Marketing
marketing.desc: To send relevant updates and promotional materials (with consent)

security.title: Security
security.desc: To protect against fraud and ensure platform security

legal.title: Legal Compliance
legal.desc: To comply with applicable laws and regulations

privacyPolicy.sharingDesc: We do not sell, trade, or otherwise transfer your personal information to third parties without your consent, except in the following circumstances:

sharingItems.providers: Trusted partners who help us operate our services
sharingItems.legal: When required by law or to protect our rights
sharingItems.transfers: In connection with a merger or acquisition
sharingItems.consent: When you explicitly authorize us to share your information

privacyPolicy.securityDesc: We implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction.
securityItems: Encryption of data in transit and at rest

access.title: Access and Update
access.desc: Request access to or update your personal information

portability.title: Data Portability
portability.desc: Request a copy of your data in a portable format

deletion.title: Deletion
deletion.desc: Request deletion of your personal information

privacyPolicy.cookiesDesc: We use cookies and similar technologies to enhance your experience, analyze usage, and provide personalized content. You can control cookie settings through your browser or our cookie preferences.
privacyPolicy.transfersDesc: Your information may be transferred to and processed in countries other than your own. We ensure appropriate safeguards are in place to protect your data in accordance with this Privacy Policy and applicable laws.
privacyPolicy.childrenDesc: Our services are not intended for children under 13 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If you believe we have collected information from a child under 13, please contact us immediately.
privacyPolicy.changesDesc: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any material changes by posting the new policy on this page and updating the "Last updated" date. Your continued use of our services after such changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.
privacyPolicy.contactDesc: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us:
privacyPolicy.dpoNote: For GDPR-related inquiries, you may also contact our Data Protection Officer at dpo@ciroai.us

cookiePolicy.title: Cookie Policy
cookiePolicy.subtitle: Learn about how we use cookies and similar technologies to enhance your experience.
cookiePolicy.whatAreCookiesDesc: Cookies are small text files that are stored on your device when you visit a website. They help websites remember information about your visit, such as your preferred language and other settings, which can make your next visit easier and the site more useful to you.

essential.title: Essential Functionality
essential.desc: Keep you signed in and maintain your session

performance.title: Performance & Analytics
performance.desc: Understand how visitors use our website

cookiePolicy.controlDesc: You have several options for managing cookies on our website:

controlItems.browser: Most browsers allow you to control cookies through their settings
controlItems.banner: Use our cookie consent banner to manage preferences
controlItems.optout: Use third-party opt-out tools for advertising cookies
controlItems.contact: Reach out if you need help managing your preferences

necessary.name: Necessary Cookies
necessary.desc: Essential for the website to function properly
necessary.purpose: These cookies are essential for the website to function and cannot be disabled.

analytics.name: Analytics Cookies
analytics.desc: Help us understand how visitors interact with our website
analytics.purpose: These cookies help us understand how visitors interact with our website by collecting and reporting information anonymously.

marketing.name: Marketing Cookies
marketing.desc: Used to track visitors across websites for marketing purposes
marketing.purpose: These cookies are used to track visitors across websites to display relevant advertisements and measure marketing effectiveness.

preferences.name: Preferences Cookies
preferences.desc: Allow the website to remember your preferences
preferences.purpose: These cookies allow the website to remember choices you make and provide enhanced, more personal features.

cookiePolicy.cookieSettingsDesc: You can manage your cookie preferences at any time. Click the button below to open our cookie settings panel.
cookiePolicy.browserSettingsDesc: You can also control cookies through your browser settings:
cookiePolicy.thirdPartyDesc: For advertising cookies, you can use these opt-out tools:
cookiePolicy.importantNoteDesc: Disabling certain cookies may affect the functionality of our website. Necessary cookies cannot be disabled as they are essential for the website to function properly.

cookieBanner.title: We use cookies to enhance your experience
cookieBanner.description: We use cookies and similar technologies to help personalize content, provide a better user experience, and analyze our traffic. By clicking "Accept All", you consent to our use of cookies.

necessary.title: Necessary Cookies
necessary.desc: Essential for the website to function properly
necessary.detail: These cookies are essential for the website to function and cannot be disabled. They include session management, security, and basic functionality.

analytics.title: Analytics Cookies
analytics.desc: Help us understand how visitors interact with our website
analytics.detail: These cookies help us understand how visitors interact with our website by collecting and reporting information anonymously. This helps us improve our website and services.

marketing.title: Marketing Cookies
marketing.desc: Used to track visitors across websites for marketing purposes
marketing.detail: These cookies are used to track visitors across websites to display relevant advertisements and measure the effectiveness of marketing campaigns.

preferences.title: Preferences Cookies
preferences.desc: Allow the website to remember your preferences
preferences.detail: These cookies allow the website to remember choices you make and provide enhanced, more personal features.
